notes: eBay's Italian marketplace platform

notes: Mobile app for iOS and Android supporting both buying and selling functions

notes: Dedicated marketplace for vehicles, boats, motorcycles, trucks, parts, boats, and accessories

notes: Parts and accessories marketplace with Guaranteed Fit program - free returns within 30 days if part doesn't fit

notes: eBay's affiliate marketing program (EPN) - free to join, earn commissions on qualifying transactions

title: Picture hosting | eBay Developers Program
notes: eBay Picture Service (EPS) stores uploaded images on eBay servers, supports up to 24 pictures per listing, max 1600x1600 pixels

title: eBay Plus | eBay
notes: Australian membership program offering free delivery, free returns, and exclusive deals - $4.99/month or $49/year

title: Buying with eBay Plus | eBay
notes: Member benefits include free express delivery to metro areas and free standard delivery on millions of items

title: eBay Plus for Sellers | Seller Centre
notes: From May 1, 2026, eBay Plus badge only available to Pro sellers meeting performance and listing criteria

title: eBay Premium Service | UK Seller Centre
notes: UK program for Top Rated Sellers offering 10% discount on Final Value Fees, requires free domestic delivery within 3 days

notes: UK business sellers program requiring Top Rated status, tracked shipping for items £20+, and 30-day returns

title: eBay Premium Service | UK Seller Centre
notes: Premium service badge for qualifying UK listings strengthens buyer trust and boosts sales conversion

notes: French trade-in/buyback program in partnership with CircularX - sell used tech products for instant payment, France only

notes: Internet-delivered interactive show hosted by Jim 'Griff' Griffith since 2003, twice-weekly program for eBay buyers and sellers

notes: Program offering refurbished products at up to 50% savings with warranties - conditions include Good, Very Good, Excellent, and Certified

notes: Warranty serviced by Allstate - 2 years for Certified items, 1 year for Excellent/Very Good/Good items, included at no extra cost

notes: Mobile app for iOS and Android enabling listing creation via barcode scanning, order management, and adding tracking

notes: eBay's Spanish marketplace platform

notes: Premium Store tier with 10,000 free listings per month and discounted fees

notes: Feature for managing payment methods and preferences in eBay account settings

notes: Notification system for eBay activity - can be configured via Communication preferences for email, app, or SMS

notes: Automated emails sent about eBay activity - configurable via Communication preferences at commspreferences.ebay.com

notes: Feature allowing sellers to end listings before scheduled end time - accessed via My eBay > Selling > More actions menu

notes: Option to cancel auction bids or sell to highest bidder when ending early - may incur final value fees if auction has bids

notes: Browse category and sort option for auctions nearing end time - includes WatchedItemEndingSoon notifications 15 min before end

notes: Watchlist sort option showing items ending soonest - primarily displays auctions as Buy It Now listings auto-renew

title: Expected delivery dates for buyers | eBay
notes: Delivery date calculation based on handling time, shipping service, and payment clearance - generated by eBay, not seller-controlled

notes: EU regulation requiring business sellers to offer 14-day return right to EU consumers - includes template return policy text

title: eBay Refurbished Program | Seller Center
notes: Refurbished condition grade - like-new condition with 1-year warranty, professionally refurbished with original or new accessories

notes: Fast international shipping option typically taking up to 10 business days - available via eBay International Shipping, GSP, or SpeedPAK

title: Export Academy
notes: Educational platform for sellers covering policies, listing optimization, shipping/logistics, order fulfillment, and account health - free training
